query: What is the height of the Eiffel Tower in meters
answer: The Eiffel Tower is 330 meters tall. It is the tallest structure in Paris. It reached this height in 2022.

results.title: Eiffel Tower - Wikipedia
results.snippet: The tower is 330 metres (1,083 ft) tall, about the same height as an 81-storey building, and the tallest structure in Paris. Its base is square, measuring 125
